title: Master Software Engineering Fundamentals
description: Achieve interview-ready mastery across all core CS pillars: DSA, System Design, OS, Networks, and DBMS within 12 months.

title: Build Production-Grade Projects
description: Design, build, and deploy three full-stack projects that demonstrate end-to-end engineering excellence.

title: Become a Cloud-Native Engineer
description: Master containerization, orchestration, cloud platforms, and DevOps practices to architect and operate distributed systems.

title: Staff Engineer at a Top Tech Company
description: Reach Staff-level engineering impact by combining deep technical expertise with strong architectural vision and mentorship.

title: Open Source Thought Leader
description: Contribute significantly to open source projects, author technical content, and build a recognized engineering brand.

title: Complete 500 DSA Problems
description: Solve 500 curated DSA problems across all categories with written solution explanations.

title: Finish 30 Technical Books
description: Read and synthesize 30 engineering books across all pillars with detailed notes and takeaways.

title: Pass AWS Solutions Architect Certification
description: Earn the AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification to validate cloud architecture skills.

title: Conduct 50 Mock Interviews
description: Complete 50 mock interview sessions (30 DSA, 10 System Design, 10 Behavioral) with peers and mentors.

title: Learn by Building
description: Always apply theoretical knowledge through practical projects. Every concept should have a corresponding implementation.

title: Spaced Repetition
description: Use systematic review schedules to reinforce learning and move knowledge from short-term to long-term memory.

title: Teach to Learn
description: Explain concepts in writing, through diagrams, and in discussion. True mastery is the ability to teach.

title: Depth Before Breadth
description: Focus on achieving depth in core pillars before expanding to adjacent areas. Foundation strength determines ceiling height.

title: Engineering Career Roadmap
description: Strategic career progression from Senior to Staff Engineer with target companies and preparation milestones.
